name: French Onion Lamb Au Jus
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a slow cooker.
2. Cook for 8 to 10 hours on low heat.
3. Remove the roast and let it rest for 20 minutes before carving.
4. Slice the meat thinly.
5. Make sandwiches using French rolls or large croissants. Spread sliced butter on the rolls and top with slices of Swiss cheese.
6. Dip the cheese into bowls of the onion soup broth.
7. To serve as a complete dinner, add vegetables to the broth.
